board.emptyDescription: Open a pay period and calculate it to roll up the blended piece-rate + hourly earnings — with the legal-minimum make-whole guard applied to every worker.

breakdown.emptyTitle: No pay lines for this period
breakdown.emptyDescription: Calculate the period to roll up each worker's blended piece-rate + hourly earnings, with the legal-minimum top-up applied.

signature.label: Worker signature · signature
signature.canvasAriaLabel: Worker signature for the cash payment
signature.helpText: The worker signs here to confirm they received the cash payment.

disbursement.captureSignature: Capture the worker's signature to record the cash payment.
disbursement.disclaimer: Deliberate and irreversible action — records a payment already made. It does not move any money on its own.

ledger.title: Recorded payments
ledger.description: Payment ledger for the period — most recent first

page.title: Payroll
page.subtitle: Blended piece-rate + hourly pay, with the legal-minimum top-up guaranteed in the data layer
page.calculateDescription: Freezes the calculation: one line per worker, with the legal-minimum top-up applied.
page.payslipsDescription: Tap a worker to view their bilingual payslip (es · ngäbere) with a QR code.
page.approvePayDescription: Approve each calculated line, then record the payment (Yappy / Nequi / ACH / signed cash).
